features.description: Config resolution helpers + local retention: effective_retention_local/remote resolve retention.* vs general.*, retention_local deletes oldest local backups exceeding keep count

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub fn effective_retention_local' src/list.rs && grep -n 'pub fn effective_retention_remote' src/list.rs && grep -n 'pub fn retention_local' src/list.rs
layers.fail_message: One or more retention functions not found in src/list.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding retention functions

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_effective_retention_local test_retention_local_deletes_oldest test_retention_local_skips_broken test_retention_local_zero_means_unlimited -- --test-threads=1 2>&1 | grep -E '(test result|FAILED)'
layers.fail_message: Retention local unit tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Unit-testable pure logic functions; behavioral layer provides comprehensive coverage with 4 test cases covering config resolution, deletion ordering, broken backup exclusion, and unlimited semantics

alternative_verification.command: cargo test test_retention_local -- --test-threads=1 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: GC key collection: collect_keys_from_manifest extracts all backup_key values from manifest tables and S3 objects

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'fn collect_keys_from_manifest' src/list.rs && grep -n 'pub async fn gc_collect_referenced_keys' src/list.rs
layers.fail_message: GC key collection functions not found in src/list.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding GC functions

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: GC key collection unit test failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: collect_keys_from_manifest is pure in-memory logic; gc_collect_referenced_keys requires real S3 (integration test). Behavioral layer tests the key extraction logic thoroughly.

alternative_verification.command: cargo test test_collect_referenced_keys -- --test-threads=1 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: GC-safe deletion + remote retention: gc_delete_backup only deletes unreferenced S3 keys, retention_remote orchestrates GC-safe deletion of oldest remote backups

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub async fn gc_delete_backup' src/list.rs && grep -n 'pub async fn retention_remote' src/list.rs
layers.fail_message: GC delete or remote retention functions not found in src/list.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding GC delete and remote retention

layers.name: behavioral
layers.fail_message: GC filtering unit test failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: gc_delete_backup and retention_remote require real S3 for integration testing. The GC filtering logic is unit-tested. Full E2E validation requires real S3 + multiple backups.

alternative_verification.command: cargo test test_gc_filter -- --test-threads=1 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: API clean endpoint: clean_stub replaced with real handler following operation pattern

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'pub async fn clean(' src/server/routes.rs && grep -c 'clean_stub' src/server/routes.rs | grep -x '0'
layers.expected: clean function found AND 0 occurrences of clean_stub
layers.fail_message: clean handler not found or clean_stub still exists

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after replacing clean_stub

layers.name: behavioral
layers.expected: routes::clean wired in mod.rs AND 0 references to clean_stub
layers.fail_message: Route wiring not updated from clean_stub to clean

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: API handler requires running server with ClickHouse. Structural + compilation layers verify correct wiring. Handler follows identical pattern to clean_remote_broken (already working).

features.description: Shadow directory cleanup: clean_shadow removes chbackup_* dirs from shadow paths, with optional name filter

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -n 'fn clean_shadow_dir' src/list.rs && grep -n 'pub async fn clean_shadow' src/list.rs
layers.fail_message: clean_shadow functions not found in src/list.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding clean_shadow

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_clean_shadow_removes_chbackup_dirs test_clean_shadow_with_name_filter -- --test-threads=1 2>&1 | grep -E '(test result|FAILED)'
layers.fail_message: Shadow cleanup unit tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: clean_shadow_dir is tested with filesystem-level unit tests (tempdir). The async wrapper clean_shadow only adds get_disks + spawn_blocking, which requires real ClickHouse.

alternative_verification.command: cargo test test_clean_shadow -- --test-threads=1 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
